name: ExtensionMeasure_Group_Type
title: R5: process | outcome | structure | patient-reported-outcome | composite (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Measure.group.type` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Measure.group.type` 0..* `CodeableConcept`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Measure.group.type` 0..* `CodeableConcept`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Measure.group.type` has a context of Measure.group based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Measure`.
Element `Measure.group.type` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: process | outcome | structure | patient-reported-outcome | composite (new)
element.comment:
Element `Measure.group.type` has a context of Measure.group based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Measure`.
Element `Measure.group.type` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
When specified at the group level, defines the measure type for this specific group. If not specified, the measureType of the group is determined by the root type element

element.definition: Indicates whether the measure is used to examine a process, an outcome over time, a patient-reported outcome, or a structure measure such as utilization.
element.comment: When specified at the group level, defines the measure type for this specific group. If not specified, the measureType of the group is determined by the root type element
